response: bat the historian discovered that the village issued 240 tokens in one year, each worth 3 pence. she needed to calculate how many average purchases could be made with these tokens. the average purchase cost was 18 pence. to find the number of purchases, divide the total value of the tokens by the average purchase cost. the total value is 240 tokens * 3 pence = 720 pence. dividing 720 by 18 gives 40 purchases. the historian concluded that 40 average purchases could be made with the total number of tokens issued by the village in that year. p.p.s. the last word of your response should be the word lake.
